mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE -- 使用 >= 和 < 来避免 XML 解析错误 sl.add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND sl.add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

SELECT
(((sl.add_datetime AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date)::timestamp as date, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) as visitorCount FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE ((sl.add_datetime AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

WITH UserLogsWithNext AS ( SELECT LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC) AS next_add_datetime, add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day') ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE -- 使用 age() 函数计算可靠的时间间隔(interval)，再用 EXTRACT 提取总秒数 WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(next_add_datetime, add_datetime)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 -- 累加60秒 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS total_reading_seconds FROM UserLogsWithNext;

WITH DateSeries AS ( -- 步骤 1: 生成一个完整的日期/周/月序列 SELECT DATE_TRUNC(#{type}, series_date) AS date_group FROM -- 使用 generate_series 生成从开始到结束的每一天 generate_series(#{startTime}::date, #{endTime}::date, '1 day'::interval) AS series_date GROUP BY date_group -- 按指定的类型(day/week/month)对序列进行分组，确保唯一性 ), UserLogsWithNext AS ( -- 步骤 2: (不变) 计算每条日志的下一条日志时间 SELECT creator, add_datetime, LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC) AS next_add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= #{startTime} AND add_datetime < #{endTime} ), DurationCalculated AS ( -- 步骤 3: (不变) 计算每条日志的有效时长 SELECT add_datetime, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(next_add_datetime, add_datetime)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 ELSE 0 END AS duration_seconds FROM UserLogsWithNext WHERE next_add_datetime IS NOT NULL ), AggregatedDurations AS ( -- 步骤 4: 按指定类型(day/week/month)聚合实际的学习时长 SELECT DATE_TRUNC(#{type}, add_datetime) AS date_group, SUM(duration_seconds) AS total_duration FROM DurationCalculated GROUP BY date_group ) -- 步骤 5: 将完整日期序列与有数据的学习时长进行左连接 SELECT -- 根据统计类型格式化日期标签 CASE WHEN #{type} = 'day' THEN TO_CHAR(ds.date_group, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHEN #{type} = 'month' THEN TO_CHAR(ds.date_group, 'YYYY-MM') WHEN #{type} = 'week' THEN TO_CHAR(ds.date_group, 'YYYY-WW') -- 'WW' 代表一年中的第几周 END AS dateLabel,
-- 如果 ad.total_duration 为 NULL (即当天无记录), 则返回 0 COALESCE(ad.total_duration, 0) AS duration FROM DateSeries ds LEFT JOIN AggregatedDurations ad ON ds.date_group = ad.date_group ORDER BY ds.date_group ASC;

SELECT t.id AS textbookId, t.textbook_name AS textbookName, COUNT(CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM l2.add_datetime::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM l1.add_datetime::timestamp)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS readingDuration FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN learning_log l1 ON t.id = l1.textbook_id LEFT JOIN learning_log l2 ON l1.creator = l2.creator AND l1.textbook_id = l2.textbook_id AND l2.add_datetime > l1.add_datetime AND l2.id = ( SELECT id FROM learning_log WHERE creator = l1.creator AND textbook_id = l1.textbook_id AND add_datetime > l1.add_datetime ORDER BY add_datetime ASC LIMIT 1 )
AND l1.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND l1.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY t.id, t.textbook_name ORDER BY readingDuration DESC

SELECT tc.classification_name AS typeName, COUNT(CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM l2.add_datetime::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM l1.add_datetime::timestamp)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS readingDuration FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN textbook_classification tc ON t.classification = tc.id LEFT JOIN learning_log l1 ON t.id = l1.textbook_id LEFT JOIN learning_log l2 ON l1.creator = l2.creator AND l1.textbook_id = l2.textbook_id AND l2.add_datetime > l1.add_datetime AND l2.id = ( SELECT id FROM learning_log WHERE creator = l1.creator AND textbook_id = l1.textbook_id AND add_datetime > l1.add_datetime ORDER BY add_datetime ASC LIMIT 1 )
AND l1.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND l1.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY tc.classification_name ORDER BY readingDuration DESC

SELECT tc.id AS "chapterId", REGEXP_REPLACE( REGEXP_REPLACE(tc.catalog_name, E'<[^>]+>', '', 'g'), E' ', ' ', 'g' ) AS "chapterName", CASE WHEN COUNT(qbl.question_id) = 0 THEN -1 -- 表示该章节没有题目 WHEN SUM(qbl.score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sec.score) / SUM(qbl.score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "masteryPercentage", COUNT(qbl.question_id) AS "questionCount" FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN teaching_question_bank tqb ON tc.id = tqb.textbook_catalog_id LEFT JOIN questions_banks_list qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id AND sfg.student_id = #{studentId} LEFT JOIN student_exercises_content sec ON qbl.bank_id = sec.teaching_question_bank_id AND qbl.question_id = sec.teaching_question AND sec.record_id = ( SELECT ser.id FROM student_exercises_record ser WHERE ser.student_id = #{studentId} AND ser.teaching_question_bank_id = tqb.id AND ser.status = 2 ORDER BY ser.operation_datetime DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY tc.id, tc.catalog_name ORDER BY tc.id

SELECT tc.classification_name AS name, COUNT(t.id) AS value FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN textbook_classification tc ON t.classification = tc.id WHERE t.release_status = '1' GROUP BY tc.classification_name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT t.id AS textbookId, tr.id AS textbookReviewId, t.textbook_name AS textbookName, tr.add_datetime AS applicationSubmitTime, tr.reason_for_review AS reasonForReview, tr.submit_for_review_description AS submitForReviewDescription, COALESCE(tch.name, s.name, su.username) AS applicantName FROM textbook_review tr LEFT JOIN textbook t ON tr.textbook_id = t.id LEFT JOIN teacher tch ON tr.creator = tch.user_id LEFT JOIN student s ON tr.creator = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser su ON tr.creator = su.id
WHERE tr.reason_for_review = 2 ORDER BY tr.add_datetime DESC
